name: Beer and Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Yellow onions, peeled and chopped
6 cups Chicken soup stock or broth
1/8 teaspoon Tabasco sauce (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently sauté the carrots, celery, and onions in oil until lightly browned.
2. Bring the soup stock to a boil; add to the vegetables and simmer for 45 minutes.
3. Dredge the cheese in flour.
4. Mix the cheese into the soup, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
5. Continue stirring often until ready to serve.
6. Add salt, pepper, Tabasco sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Finally, add the beer and stir until hot.
8. Garnish with parsley and serve.
9. Serves 6 to 8.
(Optional) You may add sliced cooked sausage or knackwurst just before serving.
